ORDER DETERMING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF DEFENDANT ANDREW KEIGHERY IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 16, 2018. THE AMOUNT OF $3,000.00 IS DIRECTED TO BE RELEASED BY THE SHERIFF TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR AS PAYMENT OF THE JUDGMENT. FAILURE OF MR. KEIGHERY TO APPEAR AT THE HEARING WILL RESULT WITH THE REMAINING MONEY BEING HELD BY THE SHERIFF BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR# 8600 =302/HK

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-28-2018 Advanced From Oct-16-18 To Aug-30-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Off Calendar

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John Cowan, Esq. 888-252-1231 for Plaintiff HEATH-NEWTON LLP.
Andrew Keighery, 650-288-8393 Defendant in Pro Per.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The parties report they have settled. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF DEFENDANT ANDREW KEIGHERY.

Off-calendar, the matter has settled. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Brenda Crow, CSR#10503, bcrow@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/HK)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-13-2018 Continued To Oct-16-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. John E. Cowan, Tel. No. 1-888-252-1231 appearing for thje Plaintiff;
No other appearance on the matter.

RULING - HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of Defendant ANDREW KEIGHERY IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 16, 2018. The amount of $3,000.00 is directed to be released by the Sheriff to the Judgment creditor as payment of the judgment. Failure of Mr. Keighery to appear at the hearing will result with the remaining money being held by the Sheriff be released to the Judgment Creditor. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk
